meaning: n.延伸,区域,河段,范围,(车子前后轴的)联接杆,横风行驶vt.到达,达到,伸出,影响vi.达到,延伸,伸出手,传开
examples: Can you reach me down that box?
Victory is now out of her reach.
I can't reach the top shelf.
They tend to have a larger reach, and so attract a larger number of potential buyers.
It is noted that the completed application must reach UNESCO before 30 April of each year.
